name: prd-to-kanban
description: Convert a PRD into a living Kanban board and shared subagent context.

interface.shortDescription: Turn PRDs into agent-ready Kanban boards
interface.longDescription: Convert product requirements, design docs, or feature specs into work/kanban.md and work/SUBAGENT.md for multi-agent implementation planning.
defaultPrompt: Use PRD to Kanban to turn this PRD into work/kanban.md.
Break this feature spec into an agent-ready Kanban board.
Create work/kanban.md and work/SUBAGENT.md from these requirements.
